intro_text: You have volunteered for a research study about food and eating habits. You will have a short online interview with a researcher. The researcher will ask you some questions.

1.title: Statement & Reason
1.instruction: Say your answer and one reason.

4.title: Full Answer
4.instruction: Use the short cues to speak the full answer.

1.area1:
Statement: I would say ____ .
Reason: 
because it can ____.
1.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
1.area3:
I would say exercising with others is better 
because it can help people build new relationships.

2.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
2.area3:
For example, in the past, I usually exercised alone.
To be more specific, I went to the gym alone every day.
It could be quite boring sometimes, and I didn't make new friends.

3.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
3.area3:
However, since last year, I have started working out with other people at the gym. 
We trained together, we exchanged fitness tips with one another, and we sometimes hung out together after each workout session.
Gradually, we became close, and some of them are my best friends now.

4.area1:
I would say ____ because it can ___
For example: before → [x statement ] →[x reason] 
However, After→ [statement] →[reason]

Relationship / Interaction

Stress/ Health
4.area3:

For example, in the past, I usually exercised alone.
To be more specific, I went to the gym alone every day.
It could be quite boring sometimes, and I didn't make new friends.
However, since last year, I have started working out with other people at the gym. 
We trained together, we exchanged fitness tips with one another, and we sometimes hung out together after each workout session.
Gradually, we became close, and some of them are my best friends now.

Now, if people want to learn something, they can simply ask ChatGPT and get the information instantly. AI can even write tools for them.
As a result, people can [work more efficiently] now.
It’s already very [popular], and I imagine it will only become more [popular in the future.]

open_free.question: First, what kinds of news sources do your friends or people in your country usually prefer?
open_free.answer:
I think most people in my country prefer using social media to get news because it helps them feel less stressed.
In the past, people usually watched TV news or read newspapers, and a lot of the news was quite serious and formal. As a result, people often did not feel relaxed after watching or reading the news.
But now, people can simply use social media. There are many different styles of news on social media. If they do not like serious reports, they can choose something funnier or more light-hearted. Therefore, getting news is not as stressful as it was before.

open_required.question: What activity is important for developing a sense of responsibility and empathy?
open_required.answer:
I would say doing volunteer work is essential for developing a sense of responsibility because it helps people know more about those who need help.
For example, in the past, I didn't do volunteer work at all. I didn't know many poor people, and I did not feel that I was responsible for helping them.
But after I started helping out at a local charity, everything changed. I started talking with the poor families there, so I understood their needs and challenges much better. As a result, I really felt that I had a responsibility to help them more, and I also cherished what I had more.

pick1_free.question: When you go shopping, do you prefer buying things online or going to physical stores? Why?
pick1_free.answer:
I prefer going to physical stores because it helps me build stronger relationships with my family and friends.
For example, in the past, I used to shop online most of the time. I usually did it by myself, so I sometimes felt disconnected from others.
But now, I often go shopping with my family or friends. To be more specific, we go to shopping malls together on weekends. We walk around, talk with each other, and help each other choose things. As a result, our relationships have become much stronger.

pick1_required.question: In recent years, online shopping has become more common. Do you think it will become even more popular in the future?
pick1_required.answer:
Yes, I think online shopping will become even more popular in the future because it helps people shop more efficiently.
For example, in the past, people had to go to physical stores to buy things. They had to drive to the mall, and they had to spend a lot of time looking for what they wanted. So shopping was not very efficient.
But now, people can shop online. They can search for products easily, and they can place orders very quickly. As a result, shopping has become much more efficient, and I believe this trend will continue and online shopping will become even more popular in the future.

questions.q: What are one or two practical ways a busy student or worker can plan meals during the week?

I see.
Would a university or workplace program that provides affordable meals with several menu choices affect your interest in choosing that school or company? Why or why not?

Interesting. Next, I'd like to get your opinion.
A cafeteria policy that replaces disposable containers with reusable ones may reduce waste but require people to return the containers after eating. Is it a good strategy? Why or why not?

highlight_phrases: people's attitudes toward convenient food change in the future
questions.q:
Good points. I just have one more question.
Will people's attitudes toward convenient food change in the future? Will they prioritize speed or nutrition? Explain.
